metadata.title: OC5-Lecanemab治疗对Clarity AD患者脑脊液中可溶性Aβ原纤维的影响

distilled_content.key_results: This study demonstrated significant benefits of Lecanemab treatment in patients with early Alzheimer's Disease
distilled_content.safety_data: Safety profile included amyloid-related imaging abnormalities (ARIA) and other adverse events
